sourceTitle: Times Higher Education World University Rankings 2026: Syria
license: Official public ranking page; factual data only

rawFiles.name: Times Higher Education Syria study destination page
rawFiles.notes: Reviewed the official public page listing current overall World University Rankings values for Syria.

transforms: Registered the official Times Higher Education Syria page as an approved source for factual ranking snapshots only.
Imported only the current overall World University Rankings values published for Syrian institutions.
Stored non-numeric ranking bands and Reporter values in rankDisplay with rank set to null.
Matched each imported row to an existing canonical university ID.
Matched the source row named Zaytoonah International University to the canonical sy-al-zaytuna-university record and retained that mapping note in the imported ranking row.
reviewNotes: Imported four THE 2026 overall World University Rankings snapshots: Damascus University 1501+, Arab International University Reporter, University of Aleppo Reporter, and Zaytoonah International University Reporter.
